acquisition method: the peptides were analyzed using a data-dependent acquisition method
alkylation reagent: 50 µl of 0.06 M iodoacetamide was added to terminate the reaction of papain digestion
alkylation concentration: 50 µl of 0.06 M iodoacetamide was added
cleavage agent: 50 µl of 0.1-mg/ml papain solution was added
enrichment method: Protein A/G magnetic beads or C1q-coated plates were used to capture ICx
fractionation method: SDS-PAGE was used to visualize the immunocaptured products
instrument: analyzed by an Orbitrap Fusion™ Tribrid™ mass spectrometer
labeling: peptides were analyzed using liquid chromatography and tandem mass spectrometry (LC-MS/MS)
